prompt: Design a three-course menu for a rainy Sunday lunch for two people who have known each other a long time. Dishes only — no explanation.
response:
Starter: Creamy roasted tomato soup with fresh basil and garlic croutons

Main course: Chicken pot pie with a flaky puff pastry crust, served with a side of buttered peas and carrots

Dessert: Warm apple crisp topped with a scoop of vanilla bean ice cream
